glosses.ja: レストラン; 居酒屋

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns in der Gaststätte am Bahnhof.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns ɪn deːɐ̯ ɡastˌʃtɛtə am ˈbaːnhoːf/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns in der Gaststätte am Bahnhof.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfn̩ ʊns ɪn deːɐ̯ ɡastˌʃtɛtə am ˈbaːnhoːf/
translations.en: We’re meeting at the restaurant by the station.
translations.es: Nos vemos en el restaurante junto a la estación.
translations.fr: On se retrouve au restaurant près de la gare.
translations.it: Ci vediamo al ristorante vicino alla stazione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在车站旁边的餐馆见面。
translations.yue: 我哋喺車站附近嗰間餐廳見面。
translations.pt: Nos encontramos no restaurante perto da estação.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp nhau ở nhà hàng gần ga.
translations.nl: We spreken af in het restaurant bij het station.
translations.hi: हम स्टेशन के पास वाले रेस्टोरेंट में मिलेंगे।
translations.pl: Spotykamy się w restauracji przy dworcu.
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε στο εστιατόριο δίπλα στον σταθμό.
translations.nb: Vi møtes på restauranten ved stasjonen.
translations.id: Kita bertemu di restoran dekat stasiun.
translations.sv: Vi ses på restaurangen vid stationen.
translations.ro: Ne vedem la restaurantul de lângă gară.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se v restauraci u nádraží.
translations.da: Vi mødes på restauranten ved stationen.
translations.ja: 駅の近くのレストランで会いましょう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 1st person plural; main verb. With the reflexive pronoun it expresses a reciprocal action ('meet each other').
Personal/reflexive pronoun, 1st person plural accusative; reflexive marker in the reciprocal construction 'Wir treffen uns'.
Two-way preposition; here with dative to indicate location, introducing the PP 'in der Gaststätte'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner agreeing with 'Gaststätte'.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'in' (dative), denotes the location.
Fused form of the preposition 'an' + article 'dem'; takes dative and introduces the locative PP 'am Bahnhof'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the fused preposition 'am' (dative), indicating place.

sentences.target: Die Gaststätte macht heute früher zu.

translations.de: Die Gaststätte macht heute früher zu.
translations.en: The restaurant is closing earlier today.
translations.fr: Le restaurant ferme plus tôt aujourd’hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 这家餐馆今天会提早打烊。
translations.yue: 呢間餐廳今日會早啲收舖。
translations.pt: Hoje o restaurante vai fechar mais cedo.
translations.vi: Hôm nay nhà hàng đóng cửa sớm hơn.
translations.nl: Het restaurant gaat vandaag eerder dicht.
translations.hi: आज रेस्टोरेंट जल्दी बंद हो रहा है।
translations.id: Restoran hari ini tutup lebih awal.
translations.ja: そのレストランは今日は早く閉まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner for the subject 'Gaststätte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 3rd person singular; main verb. Together with the particle 'zu' forms the separable verb 'zumachen' ('to close').
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Comparative adverb from 'früh'; temporal modifier indicating an earlier time.
Verbal particle (separable prefix) that combines with 'macht' to form 'zumachen'; placed clause-finally.

sentences.target: Ich arbeite nebenan in einer kleinen Gaststätte.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪtə neːbənˈan ɪn ˈaɪnɐ ˈklaɪnən ɡastˌʃtɛtə/

translations.de: Ich arbeite nebenan in einer kleinen Gaststätte.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈaʁbaɪtə neːbənˈan ɪn ˈaɪnɐ ˈklaɪnən ɡastˌʃtɛtə/
translations.en: I work next door in a small restaurant.
translations.es: Trabajo al lado, en un restaurante pequeño.
translations.fr: Je travaille juste à côté, dans un petit restaurant.
translations.it: Lavoro qui accanto, in un piccolo ristorante.
translations.ko: 바로 옆에 있는 작은 식당에서 일해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在隔壁的一家小餐馆工作。
translations.yue: 我喺隔離一間細餐廳做嘢。
translations.ru: Я работаю по соседству в небольшом ресторане.
translations.pt: Trabalho aqui ao lado, em um restaurante pequeno.
translations.tr: Hemen yan taraftaki küçük bir restoranda çalışıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi làm ở một nhà hàng nhỏ ngay bên cạnh.
translations.nl: Ik werk hiernaast in een klein restaurant.
translations.uk: Я працюю поруч, у невеликому ресторані.
translations.hu: A szomszédban egy kis étteremben dolgozom.
translations.hi: मैं बगल वाले छोटे रेस्टोरेंट में काम करता हूँ।
translations.el: Δουλεύω δίπλα, σε ένα μικρό εστιατόριο.
translations.nb: Jeg jobber rett ved siden av, på en liten restaurant.
translations.id: Saya bekerja di restoran kecil di sebelah.
translations.sv: Jag jobbar precis bredvid på en liten restaurang.
translations.ro: Lucrez chiar alături, la un restaurant mic.
translations.cs: Pracuju hned vedle v malé restauraci.
translations.da: Jeg arbejder lige ved siden af på en lille restaurant.
translations.ja: すぐ隣の小さなレストランで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 1st person singular; main verb.
Locative adverb; modifies the verb, indicating proximity ('next door').
Two-way preposition; here with dative to indicate location.
Indefinite article, dative feminine singular; determiner for 'Gaststätte' within the PP.
Attributive adjective, dative feminine singular; modifies 'Gaststätte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'in' (dative), indicating the workplace.

sentences.target: Die Freunde sitzen schon in der Gaststätte.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈfʁɔʏndə ˈzɪtsn̩ ʃoːn ɪn deːɐ̯ ɡastˌʃtɛtə/

translations.de: Die Freunde sitzen schon in der Gaststätte.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈfʁɔʏndə ˈzɪtsn̩ ʃoːn ɪn deːɐ̯ ɡastˌʃtɛtə/
translations.en: The friends are already sitting in the restaurant.
translations.es: Los amigos ya están sentados en el restaurante.
translations.fr: Les amis sont déjà assis au restaurant.
translations.it: Gli amici sono già seduti al ristorante.
translations.zh-Hans: 朋友们已经坐在餐馆里了。
translations.yue: 啲朋友已經喺餐廳入面坐低咗。
translations.pt: Os amigos já estão sentados no restaurante.
translations.vi: Bạn bè đã ngồi trong nhà hàng rồi.
translations.nl: De vrienden zitten al in het restaurant.
translations.hu: A barátok már az étteremben ülnek.
translations.hi: दोस्त पहले से ही रेस्टोरेंट में बैठे हैं।
translations.el: Οι φίλοι κάθονται ήδη στο εστιατόριο.
translations.ja: 友だちはもうレストランに座っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner for 'Freunde'.
Common noun, masculine plural; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite verb, present 3rd person plural; intransitive main verb.
Temporal adverb; indicates that the action has already begun.
Two-way preposition; here with dative to indicate location.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner agreeing with 'Gaststätte' in the PP.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'in' (dative), the location where the friends are sitting.
